mapper.select: select statistics.water_quality_parameters, address_data.alert_level, address_data.alert_number, address_data.site, address_data_image_info.time, address_data_image_info.pollutant, address_data_image_info.people, address_data_image_info.content from statistics, address_data, address_data_image_info where address_data.site = #{site} and statistics.site_id = #{site} and address_data_image_info.site = #{site};
